hero.headline: BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: NAAC A+, NIRF #7 University 2025, Institution of Eminence. In-person exams at 40+ centres. Rs 2,98,400 total fee.

sections.tldr: BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business is a 2-year programme (4 semesters) for working professionals. NAAC A+, NIRF #7 University 2025, Institution of Eminence under UGC 2017 regulations. Total fee Rs 2,98,400. Mid-term and end-term exams are IN-PERSON at designated centres across India. No campus placements (WILP is for employed professionals). 11 domain electives covering AI in Finance, Marketing, Operations, HR, GenAI, Computer Vision, and AI Strategy. Best for working professionals who want BITS Pilani's top-5 engineering brand on an AI-focused management credential.

about.body:
AI for Business is the most technology-forward MBA specialisation in the BITS Pilani WILP portfolio. The programme trains working professionals to evaluate, deploy, and govern AI systems across business functions, from marketing and finance to operations and HR.

BITS Pilani is one of India's top-5 engineering and science universities. The Work Integrated Learning Programmes (WILP) division extends campus-grade rigour to employed professionals. BITS Pilani holds NAAC A+ accreditation, NIRF #7 University 2025 ranking, and Institution of Eminence status under UGC 2017 regulations. UGC approved WILP continuation in its 548th meeting (09.09.20).

The AI for Business specialisation covers applied machine learning, deep learning, GenAI, computer vision, and AI strategy. The programme uses experiential learning methods including simulations, virtual labs, remote labs, cloud-based labs, and campus-based physical labs. This is not a theoretical AI overview. The curriculum expects professionals to apply AI concepts to their current workplace challenges.

EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from BITS Pilani. For the full programme overview including Sem 1-2 core subjects, visit /universities/bits-pilani-work-integrated-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Managerial Economics
sem3Subjects.description: Microeconomic theory applied to business: demand analysis, pricing, market structures, and competitive strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management and Business Policy
sem3Subjects.description: Corporate strategy frameworks, competitive advantage, portfolio analysis, and strategic decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Applied Machine Learning and Deep Learning
sem3Subjects.description: Supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms, neural networks, and deep learning architectures applied to business problems.

sem3Subjects.name: Domain Elective 1
sem3Subjects.description: Choose from 11 AI domain electives including AI in Finance, AI in Marketing, AI in Operations and Supply Chain, NLP and GenAI for Business.

sem4Subjects.name: Domain Elective 2
sem4Subjects.description: Second specialisation elective from the AI for Business domain pool.

sem4Subjects.name: Domain Elective 3 / General Management Elective
sem4Subjects.description: Third elective from either the AI domain pool or the General Management elective pool.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Capstone project applying AI concepts to a real business problem, typically from the student's current employer.

syllabus.note: Domain Elective pool for AI for Business: AI in Finance, AI in Marketing, AI in Operations and Supply Chain, AI in HR, FinOps for AI, Computer Vision for Business, NLP and GenAI for Business, Management of AI Products, AI Strategy Ethics and Governance, Human-centric AI, Disruptive Applications of AI. General Management Elective pool (all specs): Advanced Marketing Management, AI for Competitive Advantage, Business Environment Laws Ethics, Business Research Methods, Data Visualization, Decision Analysis, Entrepreneurship, Entrepreneurial Finance, Enterprise Risk Management, Indian Ethos in Management, International Business and Trade, Leadership and Managing Change, Management Control Systems, Project Management, Strategic HRM, Technology Management. Semesters 1 and 2 cover the shared management core. See the main BITS Pilani WILP MBA page for programme-level details.

whoHires.body:
AI for Business MBA graduates from BITS Pilani WILP target career growth within their current organisations. WILP does not offer campus placement drives. The programme builds skills for these roles:

**Industries:** Technology, BFSI, Manufacturing, Healthcare, E-commerce, Consulting

**Target roles:** AI Product Manager, AI Strategy Lead, Business Intelligence Manager, Analytics Director, AI Governance Lead, Digital Transformation Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP of AI Strategy, Chief AI Officer, Head of Data and AI, AI Programme Director

**Typical employers of BITS Pilani WILP alumni:** Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Deloitte, Accenture, Amazon, Microsoft, Google. These are based on the broader BITS Pilani alumni network. Individual outcomes depend on existing experience and industry.

skills.body:
The AI for Business specialisation builds skills that technology and strategy employers value in AI management roles:

**Technical skills:**
- Applied ML and Deep Learning: supervised/unsupervised algorithms, neural networks, and model evaluation for business use cases
- Data Science: data wrangling, statistical modelling, and pipeline design for enterprise data
- AI Applications: understanding vendor ecosystems, deployment architectures, and AI readiness assessment
- GenAI and NLP: large language models, prompt engineering, and text analytics for business processes (via electives)

**Strategic skills:**
- AI Strategy and Governance: ethical AI frameworks, bias mitigation, regulatory compliance, and responsible AI deployment
- AI Product Management: roadmap planning, stakeholder alignment, and go-to-market for AI products
- FinOps for AI: cloud cost management and financial operations for AI infrastructure

**Applied skills:** Experiential learning through simulations, virtual labs, remote labs, and cloud-based labs. The BITS Pilani WILP model expects students to apply concepts directly to their professional environment.

comparisons.body:
Comparing BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business against peers:

**vs Alliance University Online MBA in AI (Rs 1,75,000):** Alliance offers AI as an MBA spec at lower fees. BITS Pilani's advantages are clear: NIRF #7 vs Alliance's position, Institution of Eminence status, and BITS Pilani's deep engineering heritage. The BITS Pilani elective pool (11 AI domain electives including GenAI, Computer Vision, FinOps for AI) is broader. Alliance is a viable budget option, but BITS Pilani carries a different weight on a resume. Note: BITS Pilani exams are in-person at designated centres, while Alliance may differ.

**vs Dayananda Sagar University Online MBA in AI (Rs 1,20,000):** DSU is significantly cheaper at Rs 1,20,000. BITS Pilani costs Rs 2,98,400 but offers NAAC A+, NIRF #7, and Institution of Eminence. For AI roles at tier-1 tech companies, the BITS Pilani name carries substantial recruiter recognition. DSU is a strong option for professionals prioritising affordability over brand premium.

**vs MAHE Online MBA (Rs 2,92,000):** MAHE (NIRF #6) is priced similarly and has Coursera dual certification. MAHE does not offer a dedicated AI for Business spec. BITS Pilani's dedicated AI specialisation with 11 domain electives is more targeted for professionals specifically building AI careers. Both are top-tier NIRF choices. MAHE is stronger for general management; BITS Pilani is stronger for AI-specific roles.

fees.body:
BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business has a total programme fee of Rs 2,98,400 across 4 semesters.

**Fee breakdown:**
- Application fee: Rs 1,500 (one-time, non-refundable)
- Admission fee: Rs 16,500 (one-time)
- Semester 1: Rs 88,100 (Rs 70,100 semester fee + Rs 16,500 admission + Rs 1,500 application)
- Semesters 2-4: Rs 70,100 each
- **Total: Rs 2,98,400**

**No-cost EMI**: Available directly through BITS Pilani.

**Important - Exam mode**: Mid-term and end-term examinations are conducted IN-PERSON at BITS Pilani designated exam centres across India (40+ centres covering East, West, North, South zones). Only continuous assessments (quizzes, assignments) are virtual. This is NOT a fully online exam programme.

**No placements**: WILP is designed for working professionals. BITS Pilani does not offer campus placement drives for WILP students. The programme focuses on skill enhancement for career growth within current roles.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with BITS Pilani each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: Graduates receive a degree certificate issued by BITS Pilani. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration with the AI for Business specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. BITS Pilani's Institution of Eminence status and NIRF #7 University 2025 ranking make this one of the most recognised MBA credentials in the Indian online education space. WES recognition enables international degree verification. DigiLocker integration allows digital employer background checks.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Vikram Desai
items.liked: The AI Applications and Ecosystem subject in Sem 2 gave me a vendor-neutral view of enterprise AI that I immediately applied at work
items.disliked: In-person exams require travel to the nearest BITS exam centre, which meant 2 days off work each semester
items.body: I am a software architect at a mid-size IT services firm. The AI for Business spec gave me the vocabulary and frameworks to lead AI initiatives, not just build them. The elective pool is excellent. I picked AI Strategy Ethics and Governance and NLP and GenAI for Business. Both were directly relevant to my company's GenAI rollout. The BITS Pilani brand carried weight when I presented AI strategy proposals to our CTO. Be prepared for in-person exams. They are serious, proctored, and at designated centres. No shortcuts.

items.name: Sneha Iyer
items.liked: Applied Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Sem 3 was rigorous and comparable to what I have seen in BITS campus courses
items.disliked: No placement support at all. WILP is strictly for working professionals, so you are on your own for career moves
items.body: I enrolled while working at a product company as a data analyst. The programme helped me move into an AI Product Manager role within the same company. The curriculum is not a surface-level AI overview. Applied ML and Deep Learning went deep into algorithms. The project in Sem 4 let me build something real for my team. BITS Pilani's name on the degree opened conversations with recruiters, though I found the next role through my own network, not through any WILP placement.

items.name: Rajesh Tiwari
items.liked: FinOps for AI elective was unique. I have not seen this offered by any other online MBA programme
items.disliked: The fee at Rs 2,98,400 is steep compared to DSU or Alliance. You are paying for the BITS brand, and you need to be honest about whether that premium is worth it for your career stage
items.body: Good programme, but set expectations correctly. This is not BITS Pilani campus. WILP is a separate track for working professionals. Exams are in-person at centres, which is actually a positive for credibility. The AI elective pool is the best I have seen in any online MBA. But the fee is high, and there are no placements. If you are already employed and want the BITS name plus AI skills for internal career growth, this works. If you are hoping for a career restart, look elsewhere.

faqs.question: Are BITS Pilani WILP MBA exams online?
faqs.answer: No. Mid-term and end-term examinations are conducted IN-PERSON at BITS Pilani designated exam centres across India. There are 40+ centres covering East, West, North, and South zones. Only quizzes and assignments are conducted virtually. You must be physically present at the exam centre for semester examinations.

faqs.question: Does BITS Pilani WILP offer placements for MBA students?
faqs.answer: No. WILP is designed for working professionals who are already employed. BITS Pilani does not conduct campus placement drives for WILP students. The programme focuses on skill enhancement and career growth within your current role or industry. Career transitions happen through the student's own network and the BITS Pilani alumni community.

faqs.question: Is the BITS Pilani WILP MBA the same as the BITS Pilani campus MBA?
faqs.answer: The WILP MBA has comparable academic rigour and is taught by BITS Pilani faculty. The delivery mode is different: WILP uses online lectures, virtual labs, and work-integrated projects. Exams are in-person at designated centres. The degree certificate is issued by BITS Pilani. The programme is specifically designed for working professionals, while the campus MBA targets full-time students.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BITS Pilani WILP MBA in AI for Business?
faqs.answer: You need 60% in graduation from a recognised university and must be currently employed with minimum 1 year of work experience. For candidates with a 3-year degree, 2 years of work experience is required. No entrance exam is needed.

faqs.question: How many AI electives can I choose in the BITS Pilani WILP MBA?
faqs.answer: You choose 2-3 electives across Semesters 3 and 4. The AI for Business domain pool has 11 electives including AI in Finance, AI in Marketing, NLP and GenAI for Business, Computer Vision for Business, and AI Strategy Ethics and Governance. You can also pick from the General Management elective pool for one of your elective slots.

chooseIf: You are a working professional with 1+ years of experience who wants the BITS Pilani brand (NIRF #7, Institution of Eminence) on an AI-focused MBA credential.
You want a dedicated AI for Business specialisation with 11 domain electives covering GenAI, Computer Vision, FinOps for AI, and AI Strategy. Few online MBAs offer this breadth.
You are comfortable with in-person exams at designated centres and value the credibility that proctored, physical examinations bring to the degree.
consider: You need campus placements. WILP is for working professionals only. No placement drives are conducted.
You are price-sensitive. At Rs 2,98,400, this is a premium programme. DSU AI (Rs 1,20,000) or Alliance AI (Rs 1,75,000) offer AI specs at lower fees with different brand positioning.
You want fully online exams. BITS Pilani WILP requires in-person attendance at exam centres for mid-term and end-term examinations.
